name: jigmo-webfonts
description: Self-hosted chunked woff2 webfonts for CJK rare ideograph display.

scripts.build:fonts:all: python3 build.py --no-dl && python3 build.py --no-dl --variant tc && python3 build.py --no-dl --variant sc
scripts.deploy: wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name jigmo --branch main
